about.page_subtitle: 15 years of sharing Egypt's wonders with the world
about.our_story_body: Founded in 2009 by a team of certified Egyptologists and passionate local guides, Egypt Tour and Adventure was born from a single belief: every traveler deserves to experience Egypt the way Egyptians do — not from behind a tour bus window, but up close, personal, and authentic.
about.mission_body: To connect curious travelers with the living history, breathtaking landscapes, and warm hospitality that make Egypt unlike anywhere else on Earth.
about.team_subtitle: All our guides are certified Egyptologists with a minimum of 8 years field experience
about.value_1_body: Every guide holds an official Egyptology certification from Cairo University
about.value_2_body: Maximum 12 people per tour for a personal, unhurried experience
about.value_3_body: Every price includes entrance fees, transport, and guide — nothing extra
about.value_4_body: Pay when you arrive in Egypt — no upfront online payment required
about.stats_title: Egypt Tour and Adventure by the Numbers
about.licensed_body: Fully licensed by the Egyptian Ministry of Tourism

contact.whatsapp_body: Prefer to message us directly? Click below to open a WhatsApp conversation.

faq.page_subtitle: Everything you need to know before your Egypt adventure

questions.q1: How do I book a tour?
questions.a1: Simply fill out our booking form or send us a WhatsApp message. We will confirm your tour within 24 hours and provide all details for your arrival.
questions.q2: Do I pay online or in Egypt?
questions.a2: All payments are made in cash upon arrival in Egypt. We do not require any upfront online payment, so you can book with complete peace of mind.
questions.a3: Yes. Every guide on our team holds an official Egyptology certification from an accredited Egyptian university and has a minimum of 8 years of field experience.
questions.q4: What is the best time of year to visit Egypt?
questions.a4: October to April is ideal — cooler temperatures and lower humidity. December and January are the most popular months. Summer (June–August) is hot but less crowded and more affordable.
questions.q5: Do I need a visa to visit Egypt?
questions.a5: Most nationalities can obtain a visa on arrival at Cairo International Airport for $25 USD, or apply for an e-visa online before travel. We recommend the e-visa for faster processing.
questions.a6: Yes. Egypt's major tourist sites — Cairo, Luxor, Aswan, and the Red Sea — are very safe and heavily patrolled. Our guides are trained in first aid and carry emergency contacts at all times.
questions.q7: What is the maximum group size?
questions.a7: We keep groups to a maximum of 12 people to ensure a personal, high-quality experience. Private tours for individuals and families are also available.
questions.q8: What should I wear at temples and archaeological sites?
questions.a8: Modest, lightweight clothing is recommended — covered shoulders and knees as a sign of respect. Comfortable walking shoes are essential. We provide a full packing guide after booking.

gallery.page_subtitle: Explore the beauty of Egypt through our lens

visa.page_subtitle: Everything you need to know about entry requirements for Egypt
visa.intro: Egypt welcomes tourists from most countries. Below is a complete guide to visa types, requirements, and how to apply.
visa.on_arrival_body: Available at Cairo, Hurghada, and Sharm El-Sheikh international airports. Cost: $25 USD. Valid for 30 days, single entry.
visa.evisa_body: Apply online at visa2egypt.gov.eg before your trip. Faster processing, no queuing at the airport. Cost: $25 USD. Available 7 days in advance.
visa.free_body: Citizens of Jordan, Malaysia, and several Arab countries may enter without a visa for short stays.
visa.req_1: Passport valid for at least 6 months beyond entry date
visa.req_4: $25 USD cash for visa on arrival
visa.req_5: Completed arrival card (provided on the plane)
visa.note: Visa rules change. Always verify with your country's Egyptian embassy before travel.
visa.help_body: Our team can guide you through the e-visa application process. Contact us on WhatsApp and we will walk you through every step.

travel_guide.page_subtitle: Everything you need to know before your first visit to Egypt
travel_guide.cairo_body: Egypt's bustling capital and home to the Great Pyramids, the Sphinx, the Egyptian Museum, and the vibrant Khan El Khalili bazaar.
travel_guide.luxor_title: Luxor — The World's Greatest Open-Air Museum
travel_guide.luxor_body: Home to Karnak Temple, the Valley of the Kings, and Luxor Temple. The entire east bank was once ancient Thebes.
travel_guide.aswan_body: Egypt's southernmost city on the Nile. Visit the High Dam, Philae Temple, and take a felucca sail at sunset.
travel_guide.redsea_body: World-class snorkeling and diving in Hurghada and Sharm El-Sheikh. Coral reefs, tropical fish, and warm clear waters year-round.
travel_guide.desert_body: The White Desert, Black Desert, and Siwa Oasis offer some of the most surreal and remote landscapes on Earth.
travel_guide.currency_value: Egyptian Pound (EGP). USD and EUR widely accepted at tourist sites.
travel_guide.language_value: Arabic. English widely spoken in tourist areas.
travel_guide.religion_value: Predominantly Muslim. Dress modestly at religious sites.
travel_guide.timezone_value: UTC+2 (Cairo Time). No daylight saving in summer.
travel_guide.tipping_value: Customary and appreciated. 10–15% at restaurants, 5–10 EGP for small services.

packages.custom_body: We build bespoke multi-day itineraries for families, honeymoons, and groups. Tell us your dates and interests.

services.page_subtitle: Everything you need for a perfect Egypt experience — from touchdown to takeoff
services.intro_body: Egypt Tour and Adventure is your complete travel partner in Egypt. We handle every detail of your trip so you can focus entirely on the experience. From the moment your plane lands to the moment you fly home, we take care of you.
services.cta_body: Not sure which services you need? Send us a message and our team will put together a personalised package for your trip.

transfer.title: Airport Transfer Service
transfer.subtitle: Private pickup and drop-off between airport and hotel
transfer.description: Start your Egypt trip stress-free. Our professional, English-speaking drivers will meet you at the arrivals gate holding a name sign, assist with your luggage, and take you directly to your hotel in a clean, air-conditioned private vehicle. Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
transfer.included_1: Meet and greet at arrivals gate
transfer.included_5: No waiting — driver tracks your flight
transfer.note: We cover all major airports: Cairo International, Hurghada, Sharm El-Sheikh, Luxor, and Aswan.

hotel.title: Hotel Booking Assistance
hotel.subtitle: Hand-picked hotels at every budget level across Egypt
hotel.description: Not sure where to stay? Our team knows every good hotel, guesthouse, and resort in Egypt from personal experience. We recommend and book accommodation that perfectly matches your budget, travel style, and itinerary locations — from budget-friendly guesthouses to 5-star Nile-view resorts.
hotel.included_5: Nile-view rooms in Luxor and Aswan
hotel.included_6: Breakfast options and late check-out negotiated
hotel.type_3: Red Sea Resorts — Hurghada, Sharm El-Sheikh
hotel.type_4: Desert Camps — White Desert, Siwa Oasis
hotel.type_5: Nile Cruise Boats — Luxor to Aswan

apartment.title: Apartment & Villa Rentals
apartment.subtitle: Fully furnished private apartments for longer stays
apartment.description: Staying for more than a week? A private apartment gives you the freedom and space of a home at a fraction of hotel prices. We arrange fully furnished, serviced apartments in Cairo, Luxor, and Hurghada for families, groups, and longer-stay travelers.
apartment.included_4: Flexible rental from 3 nights to 3 months
apartment.note: Ideal for families, digital nomads, and groups of 4 or more travelers.

guide.title: Private Egyptologist Guide
guide.subtitle: Certified expert guides for private tours of any site
guide.description: Explore Egypt's ancient wonders with a certified Egyptologist by your side. Our private guides bring history to life with stories, context, and access to knowledge you simply cannot get from a guidebook or a group tour. Available for a single site, a full day, or your entire trip.
guide.included_5: Expert in hieroglyphics and ancient history
guide.included_6: Connects you with site managers for deeper access

cruise.title: Nile Cruise Booking
cruise.subtitle: 3 to 7 night cruises between Luxor and Aswan
cruise.description: A Nile cruise is one of the most magical travel experiences in the world. Drift along the river that gave birth to one of history's greatest civilisations, stopping at ancient temples along the way. We book cabins on carefully selected boats ranging from classic dahabiyas to modern 5-star cruise ships.
cruise.included_2: Egyptologist guide for all shore excursions
cruise.included_3: Entrance fees to all visited temples
cruise.included_4: Transfers to and from the boat
cruise.included_6: Choice of cabin class: standard to suite

visa.title: Visa Assistance
visa.subtitle: Step-by-step help with your Egypt e-visa application
visa.description: Applying for an Egypt e-visa is straightforward but the official website can be confusing. Our team guides you through every step of the online application, reviews your form before submission, and confirms when your visa is approved. We also advise on visa-on-arrival for eligible nationalities.
visa.included_4: Advice on visa type (e-visa vs visa on arrival)
visa.included_6: Emergency visa support if issues arise
visa.note: This is an assistance service. Visa fees ($25 USD) are paid directly to the Egyptian government.

photography.title: Professional Photography Tour
photography.subtitle: Capture stunning Egypt photos with a professional photographer
photography.description: Take home more than memories. Our professional travel photographers accompany you to Egypt's most photogenic locations at the best times of day — golden hour at the pyramids, sunrise over the Nile, the colourful chaos of Khan El Khalili — and guide you to the perfect shots.
photography.included_1: Professional DSLR photographer for full day
photography.included_2: High-resolution edited photos delivered within 48 hours
photography.included_3: Golden hour and blue hour timing expertise
photography.included_6: USB delivery or cloud download link
photography.note: Minimum 50 edited photos guaranteed per session.

sim.title: Egyptian SIM Card
sim.subtitle: Local SIM with data waiting for you on arrival
sim.description: Stay connected from the moment you land. We arrange a local Egyptian SIM card with a generous data package pre-activated and ready for you when your driver picks you up from the airport. No queuing at the phone shop — just pick it up and go.
sim.included_1: Vodafone Egypt or Orange SIM card
sim.included_5: Delivered to you at airport pickup

currency.title: Currency Exchange Advice
currency.subtitle: Get the best exchange rate for Egyptian Pounds
currency.description: Avoid airport exchange counters with their terrible rates. We advise you on the best legal exchange offices in each city, current fair rates, how much cash to bring, and where ATMs reliably work. We can also arrange currency exchange collection as part of your airport transfer.
currency.included_2: Best exchange office locations by city
currency.included_3: How much cash to bring guidance

camel.title: Camel & Horse Riding
camel.subtitle: Sunset camel ride around the Giza Pyramids
camel.description: No visit to Egypt is complete without a camel ride in the shadow of the Great Pyramids. We arrange private, safe, and ethical camel and horse riding experiences at Giza, Luxor West Bank, and Aswan — at sunset for the most unforgettable photos.

balloon.title: Hot Air Balloon — Luxor
balloon.subtitle: Sunrise balloon flight over the Valley of the Kings
balloon.description: Float above the temples and tombs of ancient Thebes as the sun rises over the Nile Valley. A hot air balloon flight over Luxor at dawn is one of Egypt's most extraordinary experiences. We book through licensed, safety-certified operators only.
balloon.included_5: Views of Valley of Kings, Karnak, Nile
balloon.note: Weather-dependent. Full refund if cancelled due to weather.

diving.title: Red Sea Snorkeling & Diving
diving.subtitle: Guided snorkel and dive trips in Hurghada and Sharm
diving.description: Egypt's Red Sea has some of the world's most spectacular coral reefs and marine life. We arrange guided snorkeling trips, beginner scuba experiences, and certified diving excursions with PADI-licensed dive centres in Hurghada and Sharm El-Sheikh.
